description: GitHub REST API — public user / repo / search data. No auth: 60 req/h per IP. With a token (operator-set UPSTREAM_KEY_GITHUB), 5,000 req/h.

user.notes: Public profile by login (e.g. 'torvalds'). Includes avatar, bio, follower count, public-repo count.

repo.notes: Public repo metadata — stars, forks, language, license, default branch, description.

search-repos.notes: Search public repositories. Pass q=<query>. e.g. 'q=react+language:typescript+stars:>10000'.
